title: Sada Sada lyrics kavalan song lyrics
stanzas:
Sada sada Sada sada Mazhayana konjam
Thada thada Thada thada veyil-ena konjam
Adikadi adikdi thudikudhu nenjam
Sugam Konjam
Bayam konjam

Sada sada Sada sada Mazhaana konjam
Thada thada Thada thada veyil-ena konjam
Adikadi adikdi thudikudhu nenjam
Sugam Konjam
Bayam konjam

Aval nerathil varuvaala...
Kaakathan viduvaalaa..
Parthale muraipala ...
Paal pole siripaala ...
Ketale kodupalaa...
Ketkamal annaipala..
Konji konji kadhal seidhu kolvalaa..
[Sada sada Sada sada Mazhayana konjam ...Bayam konjam..](2)

Kattu thari-indri enadhu-ullam unnai
enni kondu angum ingum kummi kottudhey

Solla mozhi indri tamil sorkal ennai
vittu vittu andhrathil ammi kottudhey

adhal theruvile, endhaasai azhayudhey ..
Neethan ninaivile, nizhal kooda velukudhey

Kuralaley ennil kudi yerikondu
Kolaikari undhan niyabagangal ennai kuthudhey ..

[Sada sada Sada sada Mazhayana konjam ..
..
Bayam konjam..](2)

Gangai nadhi vellam siru sangukulle
Sikki kondu akkaraiku sella ennudhey

Chinna siru pillai oru sopanathai
vaithu kondu kannurakkam kettu nikkudhey

Nee en edhirile, varavendum viraivile
Neril varumvari, mugam katu kanavile

Medhuvaga sellum  kedigara mullum
Unnai kaanasolli iyyai-iyyo nacharikudhey..
[Sada sada Sada sada Mazhayana konjam ....Bayam konjam..](2)

Aval nerathil varuvaala...
Kaakathan viduvaalaa..
Parthale muraipala ...
Paal pole siripaala ...
Ketale kodupalaa...
Ketkamal annaipala..
Konji konji kadhal seidhu kolvalaa..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Sada Sada'?

'Sada Sada' conveys feelings of love and joy, expressing the excitement and nervousness that come with romance.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Kaavalan'?

In Kaavalan, the song illustrates the protagonist's feelings towards his love interest, showcasing their budding romance.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Sada Sada'?

The song is sung by Karthik and composed by Vidyasagar, known for their remarkable collaboration in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Sada Sada' released?

'Sada Sada' was released on December 11, 2010, as part of the movie Kaavalan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sada Sada, the protagonist expresses his feelings of love and excitement, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of romance. The song's upbeat tempo and joyful lyrics create a vibrant atmosphere, making it a favorite among listeners. Set against the backdrop of Kaavalan, it highlights the playful and tender moments between the lead characters. The combination of Karthik's melodious voice and Vidyasagar's engaging composition evokes a sense of happiness and warmth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sada Sada from Kaavalan is a delightful melody that captures the essence of romance and joy. With Karthik's enchanting vocals and Vidyasagar's captivating composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Experience the magic of love through this beautifully crafted piece that resonates with every listener.
stanzaMeanings: Always, always, a little rain, a little sunshine, my heart beats a bit faster, a little happiness, a little fear.
Always, always, a little rain, a little sunshine, my heart beats a bit faster, a little happiness, a little fear.
She will come at the right time... Will not let go... When I see her, she smiles like milk... Will give me what I ask... Will not refuse... Will slowly make love...
Always, always, a little rain... a little fear...
Without a guide, my heart thinks of you, everywhere I go, I feel the rhythm.
Without words, Tamil phrases leave me behind, hitting me hard in the process.
In the street, what a beautiful sound... In your thoughts, even the shadow shines bright.
In my voice, I have a home, your memories hit me hard...
Always, always, a little rain... a little fear...
The river flows gently, carrying me to the shore.
A little child is resting on a step, waiting for a dream to come true.
You are in front of me, you must come in my dreams, you will come in reality, your face is in my dreams.
The thorns that grow beautifully will make me see you, oh, how lovely...
Always, always, a little rain... a little fear...
She will come at the right time... Will not let go... When I see her, she smiles like milk... Will give me what I ask... Will not refuse... Will slowly make love...
